name: Zesty Tuna Rice Salad
recipeIngredient: 6 oz. Can Tuna, drained and flaked
3 oz. French fried onion rings, canned
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the instant rice with 1 cup water and 1/4 teaspoon salt.
2. Combine the cooked rice with tuna, celery, cucumber, and green pepper.
3. Blend mayonnaise with lemon juice, lemon peel, celery salt, and dill weed in a small bowl.
4. Stir the blended mixture into the rice.
5. Chill the salad.
6. Serve on lettuce leaves and garnish with onion rings.
Makes 4 servings.
